# Welcome to Open Agent Protocol Discussions

Welcome. This is the public forum for the Open Agent Protocol.

## What this space is for

| You want to | Use this |
|---|---|
| Propose a new RFC or a substantive change to an existing RFC | The **RFC Proposal** discussion category |
| Report on an implementation or integration | The **Implementer Reports** category |
| Ask how to model something or which RFC applies | The **Q and A** category |
| Discuss governance, Working Group scope, or process | The **Governance** category |
| Share something you built that uses OAP | The **Show and Tell** category |
| Coordinate Working Group calls | The **Working Groups** category |

For specification defects, schema bugs, and conformance failures, please open a GitHub Issue instead.

For security vulnerabilities, please follow [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/blob/main/SECURITY.md) and report privately.

## Ground rules

1. The [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) applies to all participation.
2. Substantive protocol changes follow the [RFC process](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/blob/main/governance/RFC-PROCESS.md). A discussion is the typical first step.
3. English is the working language of the Working Groups. Translations are welcome and encouraged in their own threads.
4. No single participant carries more weight than another. Voting weight inside the Stewards is governed by the [Charter](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/blob/main/governance/CHARTER.md), not by the volume of comments here.

## Getting started

- Read the [README](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/blob/main/README.md) for the full architecture.
- Read the [OAP-CORE-1.0 specification](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/blob/main/spec/v1.0/OAP-CORE-1.0.md).
- Skim the [24 RFCs](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/tree/main/rfcs) and the [10 whitepapers](https://github.com/openagentprotocol-OAP/oap-spec/tree/main/papers).
- Try the AQL playground at [openagentprotocol.org/aql](https://openagentprotocol.org/aql).
- Run the conformance suite locally: `cd test-suite && npm install && node runner.js`.

## Working Groups

The current standing Working Groups are:

- **WG-CORE**: Sessions, envelopes, identity, manifests.
- **WG-COMMERCE**: Procurement, offers, settlement, dispute resolution.
- **WG-POLICY**: The four layer Policy Stack and the Universal Prohibitions.
- **WG-DATA**: Agent Query Language, Verifiable Indexes, Subscription Protocol, Storage Substrate.
- **WG-IDENTITY**: Entities, Personas, Sybil resistance, attestations.
- **WG-CONFORMANCE**: Levels, test suite, certification.
- **WG-GOVERNANCE**: Charter, RFC process, Ethics Board procedures.

Joining a Working Group is open. Express interest in the Working Groups discussion category.

Thank you for being here.
